directory.title: Customer Directory
directory.description: Search the mobile user base, segment by status and partner state, and jump into a full operational card for each customer.
directory.searchPlaceholder: Search email, username, telegram, UUID, referral...
directory.empty: No customers matched the current filters.
directory.previewDescription: Select a row to inspect the key customer facts before opening the full card.

metrics.activeHint: customers currently allowed to sign in

detail.title: Customer Card
detail.description: Operate identity, lifecycle, wallet, payments, referral, and partner context from a single customer card.
detail.stateDescription: Adjust customer lifecycle flags directly from the admin card.
detail.activateDescription: Allow this customer to authenticate again and return to normal product usage.
detail.deactivateDescription: Block this customer from authenticating until the account is reactivated by staff.
detail.identityDescription: Core identity, delivery, and linkage fields stored for this mobile user.
detail.profileDescription: Correct delivery fields, Telegram linkage, and referral identity without leaving the customer card.
detail.invalidEmail: Provide a valid email before saving the profile.
detail.recoveryDescription: Rotate customer credentials, issue a temporary password, and optionally clear every registered mobile device in the same recovery run.
detail.passwordRequired: Enter a password or generate a temporary one before continuing.
detail.passwordRequirements: Password must be at least 12 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, digits, and a special character.
detail.recoveryReasonPlaceholder: Summarise why credentials are being rotated or why sessions need to be cleared
detail.revokeDevicesAfterReset: Clear all registered devices after password rotation
detail.revokeDevicesAfterResetHint: This currently removes {count} registered devices and forces mobile re-registration on the next session.
detail.passwordResetSuccess: Customer password rotated. Device sessions cleared: {count}.
detail.passwordResetGeneratedSuccess: Temporary password issued. Device sessions cleared: {count}.
detail.recoveryProtocolDescription: Use a manual password when support already verified the next credential with the customer. Use a temporary password for controlled takeover recovery, then share it through an approved secure channel.
detail.recoveryResultEmpty: No recovery action has been executed in this session yet.
detail.generatedPasswordHint: This temporary password is shown once after the reset succeeds. Share it only through an approved secure support channel.
detail.subscriptionDescription: Current subscription health, config delivery, traffic, and client links resolved from the linked VPN identity.
detail.subscriptionEmpty: No subscription snapshot is available for this customer.
detail.subscriptionLinkDriftWarning: Stored delivery URL differs from the upstream subscription URL. Resync the customer record before sharing recovery instructions.
detail.configDescription: Primary delivery config resolved for the linked subscription.
detail.linksEmpty: No additional client links were returned.
detail.resyncSubscriptionDescription: Refresh the customer record from the upstream Remnawave subscription URL so support shares the correct delivery link.
detail.subscriptionResyncSuccess: Stored subscription URL resynced from upstream.
detail.subscriptionResyncNoChange: Stored subscription URL is already in sync.
detail.playbooksDescription: Suggested next actions based on lifecycle, VPN state, notes, devices, and subscription health.
detail.playbooksEmpty: No support playbooks are currently suggested for this customer.
detail.devicesDescription: Registered mobile devices currently known for this customer account.
detail.devicesEmpty: No registered devices found for this customer.
detail.revokeDeviceDescription: Remove this device from the customer account. The device will need to authenticate again before it can continue using the product.
detail.revokeAllDevicesDescription: Remove every registered device from this customer account. Existing mobile sessions will need to register again before they can continue.
detail.revokeAllDevicesSubject: {count} registered devices will be removed from the customer account.
detail.walletDescription: Inspect balance state and credit funds without leaving the customer card.
detail.walletUnavailable: Wallet is not available for this customer yet.
detail.paymentsDescription: Latest payment records tied to this customer UUID.
detail.paymentsEmpty: No payments were returned for this customer.
detail.vpnDescription: Inspect the linked Remnawave account and quickly toggle VPN access for recovery operations.
detail.vpnUnavailable: This customer has no linked VPN identity yet.
detail.vpnLoadError: VPN access data failed to load.
detail.vpnEnableDescription: Restore VPN access for this linked Remnawave user.
detail.vpnDisableDescription: Immediately disable VPN access for this linked Remnawave user.
detail.notesDescription: Capture operator context, billing notes, and support breadcrumbs directly on the customer card.
detail.notePlaceholder: Summarise what happened, what was changed, and what the next operator should know.
detail.timelineDescription: Unified operational trail across payments, wallet changes, devices, notes, withdrawals, and admin actions.
detail.timelineEmpty: No support timeline events were returned yet.
detail.referralDescription: Commission performance for this customer as a referrer.
detail.partnerDescription: Partner performance, codes, and recent earnings for this customer.
detail.partnerEmpty: This customer is not in the partner programme yet.

operations.title: Operations Insight
operations.description: Canonical support, finance, risk, and service-access overlays for this customer, resolved from backend-owned platform contracts.
operations.empty: No operational overlays are available for this customer yet.
operations.ordersEmpty: No canonical order insights were returned for this customer.
operations.serviceAccessEmpty: No canonical service access artifacts were returned for this customer.
operations.settlementEmpty: No settlement workspace overlays were linked to this customer yet.
operations.riskEmpty: No risk subjects or reviews were linked to this customer.
operations.financeHidden: Finance overlays are hidden for the current operator role.
operations.riskHidden: Risk overlays are hidden for the current operator role.

dialogs.verifyPayoutAccountDescription: Approve this payout destination for the linked customer workspace and keep the canonical payout account as the source of truth.
dialogs.suspendPayoutAccountDescription: Suspend this payout destination for the linked customer workspace. The account will no longer be available for new payout instructions.
dialogs.approvePayoutInstructionDescription: Advance this payout instruction through the canonical maker-checker flow for the linked customer workspace.
dialogs.rejectPayoutInstructionDescription: Reject this payout instruction for the linked customer workspace and record the operator reason in the audit trail.
dialogs.disputeCaseDescription: Create a canonical dispute case overlay for this payment dispute without changing the dispute truth itself.
dialogs.disputeCaseSummaryPlaceholder: Summarize the operational dispute workflow you want to open.
dialogs.disputeCaseNotesPlaceholder: Optional operator note for the case thread.
dialogs.disputeCaseSummaryValidation: Provide a dispute case summary before continuing.

operations.disputeCasesEmpty: No canonical dispute cases are linked to this payment dispute yet.

dialogs.reasonPlaceholder: Optional operator context for the audit trail

playbooks.reactivateAppDescription: The mobile account is inactive. Restore product access first if support confirmed the account should be live again.
playbooks.missingVpnLinkDescription: The customer has no linked Remnawave UUID. Review identity fields and upstream provisioning before touching subscription recovery.
playbooks.restoreVpnDescription: The linked VPN identity exists but is not active. Re-enable access after confirming the change with support or billing.
playbooks.subscriptionReviewDescription: The subscription snapshot reports an expired state or a config delivery problem. Inspect the config block and source subscription links.
playbooks.subscriptionLinkDriftDescription: The customer card keeps a subscription URL that no longer matches the upstream Remnawave value.
playbooks.credentialRecoveryDescription: Rotate the customer password and optionally clear every attached device when access is lost or suspicious reuse is suspected.
playbooks.deviceHygieneDescription: {count} devices are attached to this customer. Review stale devices before handling new login or config issues.
playbooks.addFirstNoteDescription: Capture the current support context so the next operator sees what was checked, changed, or escalated.

metrics.partnerHint: markup and commission earned as partner

detail.deviceSessionsClearedNo: No, existing device registration was left intact.
